pattern: Only each group's size modulo the batch matters, so reduce to remainder counts and search the best ordering with memoization over how many of each remainder are left and the carry from the previous batch.
hints: A group is happy exactly when the running total of served customers so far is a multiple of the batch size, so only sizes modulo batchSize matter.
Groups whose size is already a multiple of the batch are always happy and can be counted up front; remainders that complete each other can be paired greedily.
Over the remaining remainder counts, do a memoized search: from a current leftover, try placing each available remainder, add one when the leftover is zero, and recurse on the updated counts.

edge_inputs.description: batch size one makes everyone happy
all groups already multiples of the batch

stress.description: small group count and batch so the exponential search stays fast and unique
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    batch = rng.randrange(2, 7)
    g = [rng.randrange(1, 30) for _ in range(rng.randrange(1, 11))]
    return [batch, g]
